small_chimney.description: A 1x1 smoke particle emitter to emulate the output of a chimney.
small_chimney.flavor: The sign of a well-warmed home.

large_chimney.description: A 2x2 smoke particle emitter to emulate the output of a chimney.
large_chimney.flavor: More smoke than a misused barbecue.
